title: Wishmax Design System — Adopt, Materialize & Enforce

userStories.title: Materialize design tokens (web + RN sources)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want DESIGN.md's tokens as importable files in design/ so the showcase and downstream app PRDs reference tokens instead of literals.
acceptanceCriteria: design/tokens.css exists as a Tailwind v4 @theme block with every color, gradient, type-scale, weight, spacing, radius, shadow, layout, and surface token from DESIGN.md.

design/theme.ts mirrors the same values, adapting CSS-only constructs for RN (gradient stops for expo-linear-gradient, shadows as shadow/elevation props, full-pill 960px radius as a large finite number).
design/README.md states DESIGN.md is the source of truth, documents how to keep the two token files in sync, and lists intentional RN adaptations.
Token values match DESIGN.md for every platform-portable value (spot-check colors, type scale, radii, spacing).
theme.ts typechecks standalone via a minimal tsconfig in design/.
Typecheck passes
verification: Run tsc against design/tsconfig (theme.ts) — no errors.
Diff token values in tokens.css and theme.ts against the DESIGN.md token tables.

userStories.title: Scaffold the design-system showcase harness
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a minimal design-system-owned web harness wired to the tokens so components have a runtime to build and verify in (not the PRD-02 marketing app or PRD-03 Expo app).
acceptanceCriteria: A minimal web app or Storybook lives under design/ (e.g. design/showcase) — explicitly not a product app.
Tailwind v4 is configured to consume design/tokens.css; a token swatch/sample page renders entirely from tokens (no hardcoded values).
A dev command serves the harness and a build command succeeds; lint passes.
Dev/build commands documented in design/README.md and the AGENTS.md Unknown Stack section.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using the agent-browser skill
verification: Start the dev server, load the page, confirm swatches reflect the token values.
Run the build, typecheck, and lint commands.

userStories.title: Install brand fonts (web loaded; RN assets + config delivered)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the brand fonts available so type renders as designed — applied on web now, with RN assets and registration config ready for PRD-03 to bundle.
acceptanceCriteria: Cabinet Grotesk (display) and Inter (text) self-hosted (or license-compliant source) and applied via the font tokens in the showcase harness.
Font files committed under design/fonts/ with an expo-font registration snippet/config documented for PRD-03 to bundle (RN runtime registration verified later in PRD-03).
Web and RN fallback stacks defined so missing glyphs degrade gracefully.
A sample heading renders in Cabinet Grotesk and body text in Inter in the browser.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using the agent-browser skill
verification: Load the harness; confirm the heading and body render in the correct faces; capture a screenshot.
Confirm design/fonts/ contains the font files plus a documented expo-font config.

userStories.title: Core control components from tokens
userStories.description: As a developer, I want buttons, chips, and badges built from tokens so every screen reuses them.
acceptanceCriteria: Primary filled button (black/white), ghost button, filter chip, and pill badge implemented per DESIGN.md specs in the showcase harness.
All states present: default/hover/pressed/disabled, plus loading for the primary button.
Semantic status variants (Done/Processing/Failed) wired to the status tokens on the badge.
Components reference tokens only — no literal hex/px/font values in component code.
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
Verify in browser using the agent-browser skill
verification: Grep component source for literal hex/px/font values — none found.
Load the harness and exercise each component state.

userStories.title: Feed photo tile & before/after card
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the hero photography components since they anchor both the app feed and the marketing gallery.
acceptanceCriteria: Feed photo tile: ~3:4 portrait, 12px radius, full-bleed image, optional category chip + lock/Premium badge over a legibility scrim, shimmer loading state.
Before/after card built from two tiles (or a slider) with Before/After pill labels.
Both built from tokens; pressed/selected states defined.
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
Verify in browser using the agent-browser skill
verification: Load the harness; confirm aspect ratio, radius, scrim, shimmer, and Before/After labels.

userStories.title: Content card & modal/sheet surfaces
userStories.description: As a developer, I want card and overlay surfaces so cards and modals are on-brand.
acceptanceCriteria: Standard content card (white, 12px radius, --shadow-sm, max two type sizes) implemented.
Modal/sheet surface (16px radius, --shadow-lg) implemented — derived from the --radius-modals token and the paywall surface spec.
Built from tokens; no literal visual values.
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
Verify in browser using the agent-browser skill
verification: Load the harness; confirm card radius/shadow, the two-type-size limit, and the modal radius/shadow.

userStories.title: Paywall surface
userStories.description: As a developer, I want an on-brand paywall surface so the subscription/credits flow matches the system.
acceptanceCriteria: Paywall surface per spec: selectable plan cards (selected = black border / black fill accent), price prominent in display type, 'Restore purchases' link present, black primary CTA.
Gradient wash allowed as the section background only — never on the button or other interactive elements.
Built from tokens; no literal visual values.
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
Verify in browser using the agent-browser skill
verification: Load the harness; confirm plan-selection state, price prominence, restore link, black CTA, and that no gradient appears on the button.

userStories.title: Reference showcase page (assemble & verify the whole system)
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want one page rendering the whole system so I can verify the intended look and catch drift.
acceptanceCriteria: The showcase harness renders the full system: palette, gradients, type scale, spacing scale, and every component variant/state from US-004 through US-007.
Everything consumes the exported tokens from design/ (proving the pipeline), not hardcoded copies.
Typecheck passes
Lint passes
Verify in browser using the agent-browser skill; capture a screenshot in progress.txt
verification: Load the showcase; confirm every section is present and token-driven; save a screenshot to progress.txt.

userStories.title: Enforce the system in agent instructions
userStories.description: As the team, I want the design rule baked into the Ralph loop so the agent follows DESIGN.md every iteration.
acceptanceCriteria: CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md instruct every iteration to read DESIGN.md and forbid hardcoded visual values (tokens only).
progress.txt ## Codebase Patterns records: 'DESIGN.md is the visual source of truth; consume tokens, never hardcode color/type/spacing/radius.'
A reviewer checklist item exists in checklist.md to reject PRs that hardcode visual values or diverge from DESIGN.md.
Typecheck passes
verification: Grep CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md for the read-DESIGN.md / tokens-only rule.
Confirm the progress.txt pattern line and the checklist.md reviewer item exist.
